description_long: This is a sleek, modern black sedan with a streamlined body and a compact, aerodynamic profile. The car features four doors, silver alloy wheels, and tinted windows, giving it a sophisticated urban appearance. The front grille is distinctively shaped, with a prominent Mazda emblem at the center, flanked by angular headlights. The rear of the car is equipped with red tail lights and a subtle integrated spoiler, while the roofline gently slopes towards the back, enhancing its sporty look. Chrome accents are visible along the window trim, adding a touch of elegance. The overall design suggests a focus on both style and practicality, suitable for city driving.
description: A modern black sedan with four doors, silver alloy wheels, and a streamlined, sporty design. Features include angular headlights, red tail lights, and chrome window trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Mazda emblem, angular headlights, and the contoured hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door configuration, alloy wheels, and chrome window trim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying red tail lights, the Mazda badge, and a subtle rear spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the car's profile, wheels, and window trim.
attribute_headlight_design: Dual angular headlights with integrated LED strips
